explanation: This command combines 'ping' and 'copy' as per the Sigma rule. It uses standard syntax with short flags (-n and -y) and spaces to match the detection criteria. It is a valid test case for the rule.

This command removes the space between the flag and value (-n1 instead of -n 1) to test if the Sigma rule is resilient to minor syntax variations. It still includes both 'ping' and 'copy' as required.
This command uses the original syntax from the Sigma rule as a baseline for comparison. It is a direct match for the detection criteria.
This command uses an escape character (^) before the ampersand to test if the Sigma rule is resilient to insertion of escape characters. It still includes both 'ping' and 'copy' as required.
